hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "nginx -s reload|systemctl reload nginx|service nginx reload"; then if ! nginx -t >/tmp/nginx-hook-test 2>&1; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"nginx -t FAILED — config invalid, reload blocked to protect the live site. Run nginx -t to see the error, fix the config, then retry the reload.\"}}"; fi; fi
